description.content: Task (item) management operations
Returns a list of tasks filtered by project, section, label, or other criteria.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new task in Todoist.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Returns a single task by its ID.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Updates a task with new properties.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Deletes a task permanently.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Marks a task as completed.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Marks a previously completed task as uncompleted.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Moves a task to a different project or section.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a task using natural language processing.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Project management operations
Returns all active projects for the authenticated user.

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Incremental sync operations
Primary sync endpoint for batch read/write operations. Retrieve resources by specifying resource_types or execute commands for write operations. Supports incremental synchronization via sync_token.

urlencoded.description: (Required) Use '*' for full sync or token from previous response
(Required) JSON array of resource types to retrieve

description.content:
The Todoist API v1 provides programmatic access to task management, projects, sections, labels, reminders, comments, workspaces, and more. Supports OAuth 2.0 and personal API tokens. Includes incremental sync via the /sync endpoint.

Contact Support:
 Name: Todoist Developer Support
